company_name: H2O So Clean Pool & Spa Services

hero.headline: San Diego's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves more than a guy with a net. H2O So Clean delivers certified, detail-obsessed service with 13-factor water testing and 45-point equipment inspections — so you never worry about your pool again.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool, Spa & Fountain Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to emergency repairs, H2O So Clean handles every detail so you can enjoy your backyard oasis without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly and bi-weekly cleaning with chemical balancing, skimming, and filter care. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, heaters, filters, and automation systems. Most repairs completed same-visit with parts on hand.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Care
cards.description: Dedicated spa maintenance including water chemistry balancing, jet cleaning, and equipment checks for a safe, relaxing soak every time.

cards.title: 13-Factor Water Testing
cards.description: Laboratory-grade water chemistry analysis covering 13 critical factors. Perfectly balanced water that's gentle on skin and tough on contaminants.

cards.title: Fountain Maintenance
cards.description: Professional fountain cleaning, water treatment, and pump service to keep decorative water features running beautifully year-round.

cards.title: 45-Point Equipment Inspections
cards.description: Thorough evaluation of every component — pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing, and electrical — to catch problems before they become expensive.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Perfect Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll set up a free consultation that includes a full service, 13-factor water chemistry test, equipment check, and efficiency evaluation — a $220 value.

steps.title: We Inspect & Service Everything
steps.description: Daniel or one of our CPO-certified techs arrives on time with a 45-point checklist. We test, clean, inspect, and optimize — then walk you through exactly what your pool needs.

steps.title: Relax by Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine week after week with transparent service reports and responsive support. If anything is ever off, we come back and make it right — no questions asked.

about.label: Why San Diego Trusts H2O So Clean
about.headline: Certified Expertise Meets Honest, Personal Service
about.description: Founded by Daniel in 2018 right here in Carmel Valley, H2O So Clean was built on a simple idea: pool owners deserve expert care at fair prices with zero runaround. As a Certified Pool Operator (#623805) and licensed California contractor (#1067459), Daniel brings technical precision to every job. Our team has earned a perfect 5.0-star rating because we treat every pool like our own — and every customer like a neighbor.

features.title: Certified & Licensed Professionals
features.description: Every job backed by CPO certification and a California contractor's license. Real credentials, real accountability.

features.title: No Upselling. Honest Pricing.
features.description: We quote fair prices and stick to them. Daniel has been known to help customers without even charging — that's the kind of company this is.

features.title: Same-Day Response Guaranteed
features.description: While other companies schedule weeks out, we pick up the phone and show up fast. Your pool emergency is our priority.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent quotes with no hidden fees. Start with a free $220 consultation and pick the plan that fits your pool.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've maintained a perfect 5.0-star rating because we don't consider the job done until you're thrilled. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's the standard we've built our reputation on.

faqs.question: What's included in the free $220 consultation?
faqs.answer: You get a full pool service, a 13-factor water chemistry test, a complete equipment inspection, and a system efficiency evaluation — all free. We'll walk you through our findings and recommend a plan, with zero pressure to commit.

faqs.question: How fast can you get to my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For urgent situations like equipment failures or water issues, we offer same-day response. We're known for showing up when other companies make you wait weeks.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We earn your business every single visit. No long-term contracts, no cancellation fees, no commitments. You stay because you want to, not because you have to.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in San Diego?
faqs.answer: We serve all of San Diego County including Carmel Valley, La Jolla, Del Mar, Rancho Santa Fe, Solana Beach, Encinitas, and surrounding communities. If you're in the area, we can get to you.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team holds Certified Pool Operator credentials (#623805) and we operate under California Contractor's License #1067459. Every tech is trained, insured, and committed to the highest standards.

testimonials.name: Julie M.
testimonials.text: Dan recently helped me with a pool heater connectivity issue and was so patient. His knowledge and professionalism made the whole experience seamless. Couldn't recommend H2O So Clean more.

testimonials.name: Samuel M.
testimonials.text: Pool heater stopped working and filter was leaking. Called H2O which was the best thing I did. Daniel was friendly, knowledgeable, had the best prices and fastest service of anyone I contacted.

testimonials.name: Jessie B.
testimonials.text: Daniel at H2O So Clean far exceeded our expectations and impressed us with his knowledge. He had equipment on hand and was super responsive even when other companies schedule weeks out.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Never Have to Worry About?
contact.subtitle: Claim your free $220 consultation today. No contracts, no pressure — just expert pool care from San Diego's highest-rated team.
